title: Squirrel Removal in North Castle, NY | $900-$2,500
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in North Castle, Westchester. Humane extraction, exclusion & damage repair. Licensed experts serving North Castle estates. Call today!
intro: North Castle residents face unique squirrel intrusion challenges due to the town's wooded residential areas and historic properties. Our professional squirrel removal services protect North Castle homes from attic damage, chewed wiring, and noise disturbances caused by these persistent rodents. We provide humane extraction, complete exclusion work, and insulation repair throughout North Castle's neighborhoods.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Westchester County for years with specialized knowledge of North Castle's wildlife patterns and building structures. Our licensed technicians use humane, effective methods tailored to North Castle's mix of historic homes and modern estates, ensuring permanent squirrel solutions with warranty-backed results.
localContext: North Castle's tree-lined properties near IBM Road, the scenic areas around Windmill Farm & Craft Market, and homes surrounding the North Castle Public Library provide ideal habitats for gray squirrels seeking warm attics. The town's spacious lots and mature oak trees make properties particularly vulnerable to squirrel activity during fall and winter months.

faqs.question: What does squirrel removal cost in North Castle?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in North Castle typically ranges from $900 to $2,500 depending on the severity of infestation, number of entry points, and extent of attic damage. This includes humane trapping, exclusion repairs, and sanitation services tailored to your property's specific needs.

faqs.question: How do squirrels get into North Castle attics?
faqs.answer: Squirrels commonly enter through roof vents, soffit gaps, chimney openings, and damaged fascia boards. North Castle's older homes with wooden construction are especially vulnerable, and overhanging tree branches provide easy roof access for these agile climbers.

faqs.question: Are squirrel removal methods humane in North Castle?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use only humane, state-approved methods including live trapping and one-way exclusion doors that allow squirrels to exit but not return. All practices comply with New York wildlife regulations and prioritize animal welfare while solving your squirrel problem permanently.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove squirrels from my North Castle home?
faqs.answer: Most North Castle squirrel removals begin within 24-48 hours of your call. Active removal typically takes 3-7 days depending on colony size, followed by exclusion work to seal all entry points and prevent future infestations throughout your property.
